chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4295 OF 2024 Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.18986/24 2. For orders office objection No.20. 3. For orders on Misc. No.18987/24 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 05.09.2024 Mr. Ali Azam for petitioner. -.-.- This petition is filed by one Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi seeking direction that the names of the wards be paced in the Exit Control List as he apprehends that the mother who, for the time being is entrusted with the custody, may take away the wards out of the jurisdiction of this Court and/or out of the country. We have heard the learned counsel and perused the record, which shows that a Guardian & Ward Application No.11/2024 is pending which was filed by the petitioner for permanent custody. Therein on the apprehension, as expressed by the petitioner, an injunctive order was passed on 12.08.2024 in the following terms: “6. In light of these circumstances, the respondent, Mst. Nayyab Zehra Kazmi, W/o Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi, is hereby restrained from removing the custody of the minors, namely Zaidi Muhammad Mesum Hussain S/o Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi, Zaidi Muhammad Menhal Hussain S/o Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi, Zaidi Muhammad Mehib Hussain S/o Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi, and Syed Munsif Hussain Zaidi S/o Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi, from the jurisdiction of this Court and the respondent is further directed to submit the passports of the minors before Nazir of the Court until the final disposal of this case, this order shall remain in effect until further orders from this or any other Court of law.” The apprehension of the petitioner was well considered by the learned Family Judge/Judicial Magistrate Malir and there is no occasion or reason to place the names of the wards on the Exit Control List when an injunctive order has already been passed, as referred above.

In light of these circumstances, the respondent, Mst. Nayyab Zehra Kazmi, W/o Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi, is hereby restrained from removing the custody of the minors, namely Zaidi Muhammad Mesum Hussain S/o Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi, Zaidi Muhammad Menhal Hussain S/o Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi, Zaidi Muhammad Mehib Hussain S/o Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi, and Syed Munsif Hussain Zaidi S/o Syed Tahir Hussain Zaidi, from the jurisdiction of this Court and the respondent is further directed to submit the passports of the minors before Nazir of the Court until the final disposal of this case, this order shall remain in effect until further orders from this or any other Court of law.” The apprehension of the petitioner was well considered by the learned Family Judge/Judicial Magistrate Malir and there is no occasion or reason to place the names of the wards on the Exit Control List when an injunctive order has already been passed, as referred above. This being the situation the petition merits no consideration and the same is accordingly dismissed along with listed applications. Chief Justice Judge
